case_title: DAVID RODDEN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A POLITICAL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODDEN, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A POLITICAL SUBDIVISION OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA $12.40 PRINCIPAL, $.33 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $212.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
